orbit.raan: RAAN (Right Ascension of the Ascending Node)

errors.max_iter_positive: Max iterations must be at least 1. Received: {max_iter}
errors.kepler_convergence: Newton-Raphson method failed to converge after {max_iter} iterations (requested tolerance: {tol}).
errors.semi_major_positive: Semi-major axis must be positive. Received: {a} km
errors.mu_positive: Gravitational parameter must be positive. Received: {mu} km^3/s^2
errors.inclination_range: Inclination must be between 0 and 180 degrees. Received: {i}
errors.subsurface_orbit: The orbit intersects the Earth's surface! Perigee altitude ({perigee:.1f} km) is less than Earth's radius ({radius} km).
errors.t_span_positive: Propagation time span must be positive. Received: {t_span} s
errors.mean_motion_positive: Mean motion must be positive. Received: {n} rad/s
errors.radius_positive: Radial distance must be positive. Received: {r} km
errors.perigee_apogee_order: Perigee altitude ({perigee} km) must be lower than apogee altitude ({apogee} km).

leo_explorer.title: Bronze: Orbit Explorer
leo_explorer.description: Simulated a Low Earth Orbit (LEO) successfully.

kepler_solver.title: Bronze: Keplerian Apprentist
kepler_solver.description: Solved the Kepler equation numerically for the first time.

navigator.title: Silver: Orbital Navigator
navigator.description: Modified all 6 classical orbital elements and propagated the orbit.

comparison.title: Silver: Trajectory analyst
comparison.description: Compared all 4 standard orbit types (LEO, MEO, GEO, HEO) side-by-side.

hohmann.title: Gold: Space Pilot
hohmann.description: Designed a Hohmann transfer orbit between LEO and GEO.

iris2_architect.title: Master: IRIS2 Constellation Designer
iris2_architect.description: Modeled the European IRIS2 multi-orbital constellation.
